
### pthread_create  {.smaller}


 
```c
void *ComputePi(void *argument) { ...  }
void *PrintClassList(void *argument) { ...  }
int main() {
  pthread_t pi_thread, list_thread;
  if (0 != pthread_create(&pi_thread, NULL, ComputePi, NULL))
      handle_error();
  if (0 != pthread_create(&list_thread, NULL, PrintClassList, NULL))
      handle_error();
  ... /* more code */
}
```

![](/threads/texfig/pthreadCreateOver.figure.svg)

### pthread_create  {.smaller}

```{.c code-line-numbers=true}
void *ComputePi(void *arg) { ... }
...
pthread_t pi_thread;
int result =
    pthread_create(
        &pi_thread,
        NULL,
        ComputePi,
        NULL
    );
if (result != 0)
    handle_error();
```

* pthread_create arguments:
* thread identifier
* function to run --- thread starts here, terminates if this function returns
* thread attributes (extra settings) and function argument

### pthread_create  {.smaller}

```{.c code-line-numbers=6}
void *ComputePi(void *arg) { ... }
...
pthread_t pi_thread;
int result =
    pthread_create(
        &pi_thread,
        NULL,
        ComputePi,
        NULL
    );
if (result != 0)
    handle_error();
```

* pthread_create arguments:
* _thread identifier_
* function to run --- thread starts here, terminates if this function returns
* thread attributes (extra settings) and function argument

### pthread_create  {.smaller}

```{.c code-line-numbers="1,8"}
void *ComputePi(void *arg) { ... }
...
pthread_t pi_thread;
int result =
    pthread_create(
        &pi_thread,
        NULL,
        ComputePi,
        NULL
    );
if (result != 0)
    handle_error();
```

* pthread_create arguments:
* thread identifier
* _function to run_ ---  thread starts here, terminates if this function returns
    *  must take `void *` argument, return `void *`
* thread attributes (extra settings) and function argument

### pthread_create  {.smaller}

```{.c code-line-numbers="7,9"}
void *ComputePi(void *arg) { ... }
...
pthread_t pi_thread;
int result =
    pthread_create(
        &pi_thread,
        NULL,
        ComputePi,
        NULL
    );
if (result != 0)
    handle_error();
```

* pthread_create arguments:
* thread identifier
* function to run ---  thread starts here, terminates if this function returns
* _thread attributes (extra settings) and function argument_
